findings.refresh_pending_failed_not_green: pass: ok_refresh_pending and ok_refresh_failed are amber
findings.ok_refresh_complete: pass: green after canonical refresh complete
findings.support_artifact: pass: blue by contour policy because support artifact is not runtime-health truth
findings.duplicate_submit: pass: in-flight guard returns before second fetch and test covers UI_DUPLICATE_SUBMIT_BLOCKED
findings.session_only: pass: ledger is in-memory UI-session state and marked non-persistent
findings.raw_fields: pass: rendered ledger does not expose raw argv, command_id, full paths, secrets, or raw JSON
findings.metrics: pass: after_metrics.json confirms 600px panel, 1600x1000 viewport fit, no clipping, no raw path, no raw argv, visibleSvgIcons=0
